Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Wiegel, (415)552-8230, for Cross-Defendants/Moving parties Harold Goldman and Zelda Goldman.
David T. Chapman, (415)613-9483, for Defendant/Opposing party Kim Lawrence Boliba. (via court call)

Discussed. The Court inquires if David Chapman counsel for the Defendant complied with CRC 3.1308 and notified all other other parties of his intention to appear. Mr. Chapman did not comply.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS HAROLD GOLDMAN, ZELDA GOLDMAN'S Petition To Compel Binding Arbitration, Appoint A Neutral Arbitrator is GRANTED. Cross-complaints shall proceed to binding arbitration. This action is stayed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
